summary:
Please develop a Medical Chatbot application based on 5 Agents like - Cancer Care, Diabetes, Mental Illness, Cardio & Respiratory
	Consider CDC & PubMed as RAG Database
	Add features like chat message download button, Prescription download button, Mike button, Multimodal, Multilingual - Hindi, English & Spanish
requirement_text:
Organisation: Feuji Software Solution Pvt. Ltd.
Segment: Healthcare

AI SUGGESTED & EDITED PARAMETERS:
APP TYPE: Conversational AI Chatbot
SEGMENT: Healthcare
PROBLEM: Develop a Medical Chatbot application featuring five specialty areas: Cancer Care, Diabetes, Mental Illness, Cardiology, and Respiratory Health. Utilize CDC and PubMed as primary Reference-as-a-Guide (RAG) databases. Incorporate features such as chat message and prescription downloads, voice input capability, and support for text, voice, and image modalities across multiple languages, including Hindi, English, and Spanish.
TOOLS AND TECH STACKS: Python, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, TensorFlow
KNOWLEDGE BASE SOURCES: CDC, PubMed, WHO guidelines, Clinical trials
LLM FOUNDATION MODEL: GPT-4, BERT
PERSONA AND TONE: Caring, knowledgeable, and patient-centric
SUPPORTED LANGUAGES: English, Hindi, Spanish
MULTIMODAL CAPABILITIES: Text, Voice, and Image understanding
FALLBACK MECHANISMS: Escalate to human agent, Provide detailed error messages for user guidance
EXPECTED OUTCOME: Deliver accurate and timely medical assistance, and streamline patient communications
TARGET USER SPECIFICATION: Patients dealing with cancer, diabete

acceptance_criteria.then: Validate & sanitise all inputs against the declared schema.
Log every decision/response immutably for audit.
Produce cluster/anomaly assignments with a quality score.
Persist the fitted model + assignment for each input row.

business_rules.statement: Validate & sanitise all inputs against the declared schema.
Log every decision/response immutably for audit.
Produce cluster/anomaly assignments with a quality score.
Persist the fitted model + assignment for each input row.

architecture.excerpt:
%% C4 Context
flowchart LR
  User([User]) --> GW[API Gateway]
  GW --> ORC[Orchestrator]
  ORC --> C0[Retriever / RAG]
  ORC --> C1[Guardrails]
  ORC --> C2[LLM fallback]
  ORC --> C3[Audit]

%% Sequence
sequenceDiagram
  User->>ORC: message
  ORC->>SAFE: guardrail check
  ORC->>RAG: retrieve (sources)
  RAG-->>ORC: passages + citation
  ORC-->>User: answer + source

%% ER
erDiagram
  MC_REQUEST ||--o| MC_RESPONSE : yields
  MC_REQUEST ||--o{ AUDIT_EVENT : logs
